result:
**Infrastructure Operations Summary**

15 services across 6+ environments (dev sandbox, QA, green/blue pools, staging, canary, prod) underwent operations: scaling, upgrading, patching, migrating, rolling back, reconfiguring, draining, resuming, inspecting, pausing, health-checking, redeploying. Most completed successfully; some required manual retries. Outcomes: alerts cleared, error rates stabilized, memory pressure reduced, normal latency restored.

**Services:** billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service

Follow-up config cleanup and threshold review tasks filed. No customer impact observed. Pager quiet most shifts.
